name: Brightening Serum
details: High-performance brightening serum with Vitamin C.
straight_up: Get that instant glow with our specialized Vitamin C formula.
lowdown: Helps improve the look of pores in just 1 week.
Brightens and evens skin tone with every sleep.
Plumps skin and improves the look of wrinkles instantly.

reviews_list.comment: You made it so simple. My skin feels so much smoother and the glow is real! Just choose the product, apply, and see the changes.
Best serum I've used so far. Highly recommended for dark spots.

name: Hydrating Face Cream
details: Deep hydration for dry and sensitive skin types.
straight_up: Moisture that lasts 24 hours without feeling greasy.
lowdown: Locks in moisture for a dewy finish.
Contains hyaluronic acid for deep repair.
Dermatologist tested and paraben-free.

reviews_list.comment: Very hydrating, but a bit thick for daytime use. Perfect for night.
Finally found something that doesn't irritate my sensitive skin.

name: Brow Defining Gel
details: Clear and tinted gel for perfect brow setting.
straight_up: Define your brows with natural-looking hair strokes.
lowdown: Smudge-proof and water-resistant formula.
Long-lasting hold for up to 12 hours.
Enriched with vitamins for brow growth.

reviews_list.comment: Holds my brows in place all day without feeling crunchy.

name: Eye Recovery Mask
details: Cooling eye mask to reduce puffiness and dark circles.
straight_up: Wake up looking refreshed even after a long night.
lowdown: Reduces dark circles in 2 weeks.
Cooling sensation instantly calms eyes.
Safe for contact lens wearers.

reviews_list.comment: Love the cooling effect. Helps with my morning puffiness.

name: Night Repair Oil
details: Powerful overnight recovery oil for aged skin.
straight_up: The ultimate solution for anti-aging and skin repair.
lowdown: Reduces fine lines and wrinkles.
Non-comedogenic (won't clog pores).
Noticeable results in 14 nights.

reviews_list.comment: Waking up with plump skin every morning. Worth the price!

name: Daily Sunscreen SPF 50
details: Lightweight sunscreen with zero white cast.
straight_up: Invisible protection against UVA and UVB rays.
lowdown: Sweat and water resistant for 80 mins.
No sticky residue, perfect under makeup.
Contains antioxidants for skin protection.

reviews_list.comment: No white cast at all! Works perfectly under my foundation.

name: Lip Plumping Balm
details: Hydrating balm that adds natural volume to lips.
straight_up: Soft, plump, and healthy lips in one swipe.
lowdown: Instant plumping effect.
Infused with shea butter and jojoba oil.
Available in 5 subtle tints.

reviews_list.comment: The tingle is strong but the results are beautiful.

name: Complete Glow Set
details: A 5-piece set for a complete morning routine.
straight_up: Everything you need for a radiant skin in one box.
lowdown: Includes Cleanser, Toner, Serum, and Cream.
Saves $30 compared to buying individually.
Comes with a luxury travel pouch.

reviews_list.comment: The perfect gift set. The pouch is high quality too!
